name: Shard
description: Glassy random triangles spun across a dark field — corners stretch and snap to new silhouettes with every seed.

code.style: --ink: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: var(--ink); clip-path: polygon(@rand(0%, 100%) 0%, 100% @rand(0%, 100%), 0% @rand(0%, 100%)); opacity: @rand(0.55, 1); transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)) scale(@rand(0.7, 1.05)); } transition: ease 500ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
